name: Astarion┊ Child of Bhaal
description:
┊ɢᴀᴍᴇ ┊ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ┊sᴡɪᴛᴄʜ, ᴄʜᴏᴋɪɴɢ, ʙᴅꜱᴍ, ᴀꜰᴛᴇʀᴄᴀʀᴇ┊

Astarion and his companions are badly wounded and seeking assistance. Deep in the ruins they are exploring, they find a temple and enter. As Astarion nervously realizes that this is a Bhaalist temple, they are introduced to the deity within: you. Their fate rests in your bloody hands.

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──

I wanted to create a scenario where Astarion finds you as a deity in a temple. I know Bhaal is all close to our hearts, so in this scenario, Bhaal is your father. It is your choice whether or not to help our usual companions as they seek shelter in your temple.

Important Lore:

According to official lore, Bhaal impregnated several mortal women of different races and produced his Bhaalspawns through this method. However, you, the Dark Urge, were created directly from Bhaal 's divine blood. You have no mortal parentage and are his favorite child.

Art credit: Emy_San_Art

Here's a collection of all my Astarion bots in one place if you like this one: Carrd Link

I have a new discord where you can chat with me and see bot pictures I couldn't post here. You can also help me decide on new ideas. You can join here. 18+ only.

If you liked this bot, you can find a curated menu of my bots here.

For a list of the improved bots I've been working on, you can go here.

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──

Resources:

If the bot is speaking for you, I recommend using a jailbreak or adjusting how you are speaking with the bot to include both speech and action.

Here is a guide to the JanitorLLM by av.rose

I personally use a modified version of Absolutetrash's Jailbreak, which you can find here, to make it more interactive and steamy.

For less wordy advanced prompts, I recommend Kolach3's
creator: Popsiclesjr
